title: 6H: final coverage, catalog, and build gate
goal: Create a deterministic coverage validator and run the final program audit after all four domain audits pass. Verify that all 37 clusters and 111 immutable exercise IDs are present, correctly mapped, testing-ready, isolated, and buildable, then publish the final evidence report without claiming pupil validation.
acceptance: A deterministic validator reads experiments/design/6h-production-plan.json, the finalized machine-readable coverage matrix, and the discovered catalog; it fails on missing/duplicate IDs, missing prototypes/designs, incorrect years, absent source/cluster/lens tags, wrong lifecycle state, or unmapped progression statements.

The validator confirms exactly 37 planned clusters and 111 planned 6H exercises, each with one construction, one practice, and one transfer-diagnosis lens; unrelated exercises such as EX-0001 remain allowed and excluded from the count.
Every planned exercise has status testing, never validated/promoted, and every curriculum record distinguishes explicit 6H endpoints from unbanded end-of-cycle expectations.

The final report summarizes domain counts, statement coverage, cluster/lens coverage, source evidence, review evidence, accessibility/interaction gates, residual pupil-testing hypotheses, and zero unresolved blocking/high findings.

The complete Playwright gate proves every planned exercise reaches incorrect feedback, retry, correct continuation, and completion by desktop keyboard and actual 320px touch paths, with reduced-motion, horizontal-overflow, storage, service-worker, cookie, IndexedDB, and external-network guards enforced through completion.
package.json exposes a validation command for the 6H coverage program without weakening the existing check/build commands.
The complete standalone lab passes catalog validation, Svelte/TypeScript checks, the new coverage validator, and a production build.
must_ask_if: Any domain audit contains an unresolved blocker/high finding or any expected cluster/exercise/mapping is absent or contradictory.
Passing would require weakening validation, changing the immutable plan, relabeling an end-of-cycle expectation as 6H, marking work validated, or mutating exercise files outside declared areas.
A required fix needs new dependencies, persistence, network access, copyrighted content, or product behavior outside the approved decision record.
